name: Curried Tofu Salad Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces firm, lowfat, well drained tofu
2 large whole-wheat pita breads cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the mayonnaise, dijon mustard, turmeric, and curry powder.
2. Gently stir in the tofu, shredded carrots, and finely minced onion.
3. Add salt and pepper to taste and toss until combined.
4. Chill the mixture.
5. Spoon into pita pockets and serve.
